name: Russian Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt the fish and let it stand.
2. Heat a little oil in a pan, add chopped onions, green pepper, and carrots. Cook until vegetables are tender.
3. Add tomato sauce to the pan and cook for a few minutes.
4. Cut the fish into pieces and fry separately in more oil until golden brown.
5. Mix the fried fish pieces with the cooked vegetables and simmer together for 5 minutes.
6. Serve cold with potatoes.
